news.title: After local tumor approval, Novocure touts positive data in metastatic pancreatic cancer
news.snippet: After collecting an FDA approval earlier this year for local pancreatic cancer, Novocure is putting forward positive clinical data for its electric field-based treatment in metastatic cases of the aggressive disease.

news.title: CMR Surgical kicks off Versius Plus robot’s US commercial launch
news.snippet: Following FDA approval last December for its upgraded robot, CMR Surgical has begun rolling out its Versius Plus platform in the U.S.
